simple_types.name: JSON_Stream_Element_Kind
simple_types.code:
type JSON_Stream_Element_Kind is
  (None,
   Invalid,
   Start_Document,
   End_Document,
   Comment,
   Start_Array,
   End_Array,
   Start_Object,
   …,
   Null_Value);

documentation.description: Kinds of elements in the JSON stream.

enumeration_literals.name: Comment
enumeration_literals.description: Comment in JSON5 format, not implemented.

record_types.name: JSON_Stream_Element

subtypes.name: Valid_JSON_Stream_Element_Kind
subtypes.code:
subtype Valid_JSON_Stream_Element_Kind is
  JSON_Stream_Element_Kind range Start_Document .. Null_Value;

documentation.description:
Valid stream element is an element that is not a special JSON parser
state.
